title: Brelet
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''brelet''' was a creature with a mane. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] once compared [[Salla Zend]]'s hair to a brelet's mane.

{{Creature-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''
